Appearances:
Suniel Desai, property manager, appearing on behalf of plaintiff, N.R. Patel.
Attorney, Arnold Walter Evje, representing the plaintiff.

Defendants, Lynda Javier and Jeremy reyes, are present.
Attorney, Naoki Kaneko, representing the defendants through limited scope.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.

This case did not settle, the trial date remains set.
